original_hypothesis.title: Pause Blocks Withdrawals Alongside Deposits, Enabling Indefinite Fund Lockup by PAUSER_ROLE
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: All user-facing functions including withdrawSelfStake and withdrawCommunityStake use the whenNotPaused modifier. A compromised or malicious PAUSER_ROLE can indefinitely pause the contract, preventing all users from withdrawing their funds. There is no emergency withdrawal mechanism that bypasses the pause state.

proof_of_signal.lines: withdrawSelfStake: whenNotPaused modifier; withdrawCommunityStake: whenNotPaused modifier
proof_of_signal.pattern: All withdrawal functions gated by whenNotPaused; no emergency withdrawal bypass

preconditions: PAUSER_ROLE key is lost, compromised, or acts maliciously
DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE cannot or does not revoke PAUSER_ROLE and unpause in time

initial_code_evidence.vulnerable_pattern: whenNotPaused on withdrawal functions with no emergency bypass
initial_code_evidence.specific_concern: If paused indefinitely, all staked GTC is permanently locked; DEFAULT_ADMIN could upgrade but this is a complex recovery
initial_code_evidence.missing_safeguards: No emergency withdrawal function, no time-limited pause

analysis_questions: Can DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE unpause directly, or only through PAUSER_ROLE?
Is there a timelock or maximum pause duration?
Could a UUPS upgrade bypass the pause?
validation_requirements: Verify DEFAULT_ADMIN can grant itself PAUSER_ROLE and unpause
Confirm no maximum pause duration exists

original_hypothesis.preliminary_attack_scenario: Compromised PAUSER_ROLE pauses contract. If DEFAULT_ADMIN cannot quickly respond, all staked funds are locked. Even with DEFAULT_ADMIN response, the window of fund lockup could be significant.
prerequisites: PAUSER_ROLE key compromise or malicious action

potential_impact_if_confirmed.financial_impact: All staked GTC locked for duration of pause
potential_impact_if_confirmed.recovery_possibility: DEFAULT_ADMIN can grant PAUSER_ROLE to new address and unpause, or upgrade contract

original_hypothesis.test_coverage_gap: No test for pause + withdrawal attempt + recovery flow

technical_investigation_focus.execution_timing: Instant pause, recovery depends on admin response
technical_investigation_focus.detection_analysis: Immediately visible on-chain via Paused event

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
